user_input: Run a deep summary of NVDA news and tell me the dominant sentiment.
final_answer: Subagent reports neutral-to-positive sentiment on NVDA over the last 7 days, dominated by earnings-beat coverage.
notes: Hand-crafted subagent fixture. v1 has no live subagent capture — parent's tool_calls is empty because the delegate-to-subagent dispatch happens outside the recorded tool loop. The child trace is embedded in subagent_traces[] with the same nested shape (tools_available + tool_calls) so commit 3's validator can recurse and catch child-side tool drift. Hashes are illustrative; the field's existence + nested shape is what's load-bearing.
